output:
CVE-2021-37118 is a medium-severity vulnerability in the HwNearbyMain module due to improper handling of exceptional conditions, classified under CWE-755. Exploiting this vulnerability could lead to unauthorized message leakage.

The affected software is Huawei HarmonyOS, specifically versions prior to 2.0. Users operating this system may be exposed to risks linked to this vulnerability.

Applicable mitigation techniques include M1057, which involves monitoring to detect and manage this type of vulnerability. The associated MITRE ATT&CK technique is T1005, focusing on data from local systems.
